# Masterful

> Masterful is a search visibility studio offering SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). The service helps businesses appear in AI-generated search answers across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

## Services

- [SEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/seo.html): Technical SEO, content strategy, topical authority for Google rankings.
- [AEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/aeo.html): Pages that ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini cite by name. Prompt mapping, schema, model benchmarking.
- [GEO](https://masterful-app.com/services/geo.html): Entity building on Wikipedia, Wikidata, and reference sources AI models read during training.

## How It Works

- [Process](https://masterful-app.com/process/): Five-phase engagement from free audit through foundation work to velocity.
- [Free Audit](https://masterful-app.com/audit/): Six-question form. 18-page visibility report within 48 hours. Covers 6 AI tools, top 50 buyer prompts, competitor citation map, 90-day roadmap.

## Key Information


- Contact: info@masterful-app.com
- Other contact: jordanshammah@masterful-app.com

## Journal

- [Journal](https://masterful-app.com/journal/): Published methodology and insights on SEO, AEO, and GEO.
